Est. 2013 · Bangkok, Thailand

Thailand's Trusted
Open Source ERP Partner

Thai organisations deserve enterprise-grade ERP without six-figure licensing fees, rigid vendor contracts, or software that ignores local workflows. Ecosoft was founded in 2013 to solve exactly that — and over a decade later, we've helped 40+ clients across every major industry prove that open source delivers more.

10+

Years in Business

40+

Clients Served

4K+

Deployed Users

120+

Open Source Modules

Our Story

A Decade of Open Source ERP in Thailand

When Ecosoft was founded in 2013, most Thai businesses faced a painful choice: pay millions for proprietary ERP that barely fit their processes, or manage operations with spreadsheets. Neither was acceptable.

Our founders had spent years in enterprise software consulting and watched organisations pour enormous budgets into SAP and Oracle implementations — only to fight the software at every turn. Open source was the obvious answer, and we committed to it entirely.

We partnered with the Odoo and ERPNext ecosystems, joined the OCA (Odoo Community Association), and built Thailand-specific modules for VAT, accounting, and local procurement workflows. Today those modules are used by organisations worldwide — and Ecosoft remains the ERP partner of choice for businesses that expect more.

2013 Ecosoft founded in Bangkok, focusing on open source ERP
2015 First Thai accounting & tax compliance modules released
2017 Joined OCA — Odoo Community Association
2019 Expanded into ERPNext / Frappe framework
2022 Reached 100+ open source module contributions
2024 4,000+ users running Ecosoft-powered ERP in Thailand

What We Stand For

Our Mission & Values

Everything we do comes back to one belief: great software should be open, honest, and built for the people who use it.

🔓

Open Source, Always

We only work with 100% open source platforms. No hidden fees, no vendor lock-in, no surprises. Your data and your system belong to you.

🤝

Honest Partnerships

We tell you what you need, not what generates the biggest invoice. Long-term trust matters more to us than a short-term deal.

🇹🇭

Built for Thailand

Thai VAT, Withholding Tax, Revenue Department e-Tax invoices, BOI compliance, and the Chart of Accounts your auditors expect — all built in, not bolted on.

🌱

Community First

We give back. Over 120 modules contributed to OCA and the ERPNext community, because open source only works when everyone contributes.

⚡

Practical Over Perfect

We focus on solutions that work in the real world — fast to implement, easy to maintain, and easy for your team to actually use.

📈

Growth Mindset

Business needs evolve. We build systems that grow with you, and we stay by your side through every upgrade, expansion, and pivot.

Why Open Source?

Own Your System. Control Your Costs.

Proprietary ERP vendors charge for every user, every module, and every upgrade. Customisation is expensive. Migrations are painful. And when the vendor raises prices or discontinues a product, you have no choice but to follow.

With Odoo and ERPNext, you own the entire system. Customise anything, extend anything, move your data anywhere. A global developer community means continuous improvement — at no extra cost to you.

Our clients consistently reduce their total ERP cost by 60–80% compared to SAP or Oracle — while gaining more flexibility, not less.

✓ Zero software license fees
✓ Full source code access
✓ Customise anything, own everything
✓ No forced upgrades or end-of-life traps
✓ Global developer community
✓ Transparent roadmap & issue tracking
✓ Thai compliance modules included
✓ Backed by Ecosoft's 10+ years of expertise

Let's Discuss Your ERP Project

Whether you're evaluating ERP for the first time, planning a migration from SAP or Oracle, or looking to extend an existing open source system — we'll give you an honest, expert assessment with no obligation.

Request a Free Consultation See Our Services

Specialized in optimizing business processes with 100% open source software. Consulting, implementation, migration, training, and support.
